---
title: "Final"
author: "Ben Wollack"
date: "2026/06/09"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
editor: source
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
---

# Set Up

```{r}
#| label: read-in

# read in packages
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# read in data
nest <- read_csv(here("data", "nest_data_final.csv"))
```


# Problem 1

## a.
